sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الثَّعَالِبُ وَالأَرَانِبُ لَا تَتَكَلَّمُ مَعَ بَعْضِهَا فِي الْغَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lisice i zečevi se nisu razgovarali jedni s drugima u šumi.
sentences.translationEn: The foxes and rabbits did not speak to each other in the forest.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ جَاءَ مَطَرٌ شَدِيدٌ وَفَاضَ النَّهْرُ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana je pala jaka kiša i rijeka se prelila.
sentences.translationEn: One day heavy rain came and the river overflowed.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلَ الثَّعَالِبُ وَالأَرَانِبُ مَعًا لِبِنَاءِ سَدٍّ صَغِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Lisice i zečevi su zajedno radili na izgradnji male brane.
sentences.translationEn: The foxes and rabbits worked together to build a small dam.

sentences.translation: Nakon toga su postali dobri susjedi.
sentences.translationEn: After that they became good neighbors.
